name: evaluacion-integral
description: Plataforma de Gestión de Cursos e Inscripciones

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,ANGULAR,REACT,AUTH" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold,blue.bold" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:angular" "npm run start:react" "npm run start:auth"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "BACKEND,ANGULAR,REACT,AUTH,NEXT" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold,blue.bold,green.bold" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:angular" "npm run start:react" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:next"
